description: State-machine reference schema for Thinking DNA extraction (Story 8.3.2). Defines the canonical shape of decision_framework, workflow_chains, and error_recovery extracted from AIOX agent YAML. No invented states: every workflow chain must resolve to a real task file under .aiox-core/development/tasks/.

trigger.description: Command or condition that initiates the decision

workflow_chain.description: Map of command name -> ordered task sequence
